mapper.select: SELECT project_id AS "projectId", project_name AS "projectName" FROM simulation_project ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT excavator_id AS "excavatorId", position_x AS "positionX", position_y AS "positionY", position_z AS "positionZ", body_rotation AS "bodyRotation", swing_angle AS "swingAngle", boom_angle AS "boomAngle", arm_angle AS "armAngle", bucket_angle AS "bucketAngle", operation_mode AS "operationMode", soil_in_bucket AS "soilInBucket", selected_machine_id AS "selectedMachineId", height_map_data AS "heightMapData" FROM simulation_state WHERE excavator_id = #{excavatorId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO simulation_state ( excavator_id, position_x, position_y, position_z, body_rotation, swing_angle, boom_angle, arm_angle, bucket_angle, operation_mode, soil_in_bucket, selected_machine_id, height_map_data ) VALUES ( #{excavatorId}, #{positionX}, #{positionY}, #{positionZ}, #{bodyRotation}, #{swingAngle}, #{boomAngle}, #{armAngle}, #{bucketAngle}, #{operationMode}, #{soilInBucket}, #{selectedMachineId}, #{heightMapData} ) ON CONFLICT (excavator_id) DO UPDATE SET position_x = EXCLUDED.position_x, position_y = EXCLUDED.position_y, position_z = EXCLUDED.position_z, body_rotation = EXCLUDED.body_rotation, swing_angle = EXCLUDED.swing_angle, boom_angle = EXCLUDED.boom_angle, arm_angle = EXCLUDED.arm_angle, bucket_angle = EXCLUDED.bucket_angle, operation_mode = EXCLUDED.operation_mode, soil_in_bucket = EXCLUDED.soil_in_bucket, selected_machine_id = EXCLUDED.selected_machine_id, height_map_data = EXCLUDED.height_map_data, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
